$comment: bt-create game registry. Entries seed new projects: source_class is COPIED from src/babylon/classes/ into src/scripts/<ProjectClassName>.ts and renamed (never edit the library). The starter repo is the source of truth — if a source_class file is absent, use fallback_class, else the starter's default GameMode. scene_url may be omitted when the source class loads its own assets. Grow this list as new demo classes and hosted scenes ship.

entries.title: Racing
entries.notes: The vehicle demo pattern: load terrain + riggedmustang.gltf, FindScriptComponent(StandardCarController/VehicleInputController/VehicleCameraManager), enableInput. Full driving physics is BUILT-IN — never write suspension/tire code.

entries.title: Third-Person Adventure
entries.notes: The player demo pattern: load scene + playerarmature.gltf, FindScriptComponent(CharacterController/ThirdPersonPlayerController), attachCamera + enableInput. Movement, jumping, animation blending are BUILT-IN.

entries.title: Physics Playground
entries.notes: Havok rigidbodies, raycasts, and the joint suite are BUILT-IN toolkit components.

entries.title: First-Person Explorer
entries.notes: FreeCamera navigation mode; upgrade path to StandardPlayerController in first-person configuration for physics-backed movement.

entries.title: Blank Canvas
entries.notes: Minimal default GameMode, no scene. The seed for specific prompts that match no genre — honor the prompt from a clean, working base. Never block on ambiguity when intent is clear.
